# Rillet

> AI Registry entry [AIR-24](https://linear.app/janusd/issue/AIR-24/rillet) — status **Evaluating** as of 2026-04-01. Departments: finance.

**Category:** ERP / AI-Powered Accounting
**Cost:** TBC
**Departments:** Finance

## Overview

AI-native accounting and GL platform purpose-built for SaaS/subscription businesses. Replaces legacy accounting (NetSuite, Sage) with automated real-time revenue recognition, GL management, financial close.

## Capabilities

* Automated GL with real-time transaction processing
* ASC 606 / IFRS 15 revenue recognition for subscriptions
* Automated journal entries and reconciliation
* Native integrations: Stripe, Chargebee, HRIS, banking
* Audit trail and compliance-ready reporting
* Multi-entity, multi-currency

## Why Evaluating

Direct comparator to [[campfire|Campfire]] ([[campfire|AIR-23]]). Where Campfire is broader ERP, Rillet is narrowly focused on accounting/GL — strong for SaaS revenue recognition. Awaiting Ann's head-to-head assessment.

*Evaluating.*
